name: Smuggler's Path

abilities.name: Smuggled Soulstones
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model declares the Interact action while on the enemy table half, if this crew has fewer than five (soulstone), infuse one (soulstone).

abilities.name: Bribery
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain any number of (soulstone) and heal 1 for each (soulstone) drained.

actions.name: Divert Attention
actions.effects: Make a Decoy marker in base contact with this model. Then, this model heals 2 and is placed within 4".

extraction_notes: Soulstone and infuse icons represented as (soulstone) in text
1 soulstone cost indicated by icon before Divert Attention action name
